app.name: ClarityScans
app.tagline: I CT scan yakho, ichazisiswa kahle

modules.title: Ukulungiselela Kwakho
modules.subtitle: Buka amavidiyo amafushane lawa lungaphambi kweskeni sakho
modules.allDoneSubtitle: Uyacelwa ukuba utshele udokotela oqhuba lolu iskeni uma uqedile

breathhold.title: Izikhombisi Zokubamba Umoya
breathhold.description: Kubalulekile — uyacelwa ukuthi ubuke ngokucophelela lokhu

staying-still.title: Ukuhlala Unganyakazi
staying-still.description: Okwakuhamba phakathi kumehle ukunaka kwe iskeni sakho

what-is-ct: Isebenzisa i-X-ray ukudala izithombe zemininingwane yomzimba wakho phesheya nangaphandle
Itafula lihambahamba kancane epulathweni enkulu engaphandle — awungenni ngaphakathi kwemigudu emikhulu
Umshini wenza imisindo ebanjwayo nokuhlaba — lokhu kuvamile ngokuphelele
Iskeni yonke idla iminzu e-5 kuye kwayi-15 njalo njalo
prepare: Susa konke okuqoshwe ensimbi — izikhombiso zobuhle, izikhwebu zamabhantshi, izinwele, nezitofu
Gqoka izingubo exegi elizibandakanya ngokukhululeka — ungase uphe isixhobo sesibhedlela
Xelela umxilongi wesikhathali uma ukhulelwe noma ucabanga ukuthi unga
Uma uzothola umbala we-contrast — unga dli amahora ayi-4 ngaphambi kweskeni sakho
breathhold: Uzozwa izwi elihambelanisiwe litshela ukuthi: khipha umoya, bamba ungaphefumuli
Qiniseka ungasebenzi emasekondi a-5 ukuze kube ayi-10 — ungaphefumuli noma uhlanze
Bese uzwa ngokujwayelekile: phefumula ngendlela — futhi kancane ungaqeda ukulwa kwakho
Funda lokhu manje endabeni yokuphumula engqondweni isikrini elandelayo
contrast: Ugwadla oyi-clear luquleliswa emgodleni wonyoko lwengalo yakho phesheya ngezinwele ezingaphezu kwenyonga
Uzozwe imizwa evuselela ekuthumeni yonke impilo yomzimba wakho — loku kuyinto evamile
Ungabuzwa sengathi kufanele uqoqe usizo kwethoyilethi — lena isimo esijule ukudlula
Tshelela umkhiphi ube isisoka kanye uma uzwe ubuhlungu nenyosi, usilele womoya
staying-still: Kwakushukumisa ukuncishiswa kokuncintisana kuvunyelwe konke isikrini
Izithombe ezibomvu zibonakalisa le imininingwane ye-scan ayilondolozwe ngokuphendula — kunesikhathi nesipelingi
Zisebheki zokunemba emaphandleni emzimbeni wenye noma kokunye ebonisweni yamabhaningi ezingcwele
Vala amehlo akho, uphumule uzithela nendawo yesikhathi yonke omzwelo wakho

breathhold.title: Ukuzihlupha ngokubamba okuyikho kwemimoya
breathhold.subtitle: Kweseka endleleni ezozitholeleni eskeni indlu ngaphambi kwesikhathi
breathhold.completeSub: Manje ungakwazi ukulandela ukugogomoka okuhlelwe endaweni ngeskeni sayo isikhathi
breathhold.tip: Ngesikhathi yeskeni lakho langempela umhlengikazi uzozitshengisela ezozilwandisa emhlongweni

visual.title: Ibhodi Yokuxhumana
visual.subtitle: Thinta ikhadi eliveza ukukhombisa umqhubi wosizo usabela kakhulu njani wena
visual.tapToShow: Thinta le ikuphi ukukhadi ukuze ihambishisane loku kugcwele okuhamba kokubona

feedback.title: Kube Kanjani Engabe Uyokuze Ukujabulele Njani?
feedback.subtitle: Zonke izinto ezinikwa ekuthwebulwini ezigciniwe zakho azikwazi kubhekiswa ugesi zethu njani zoziveze kwakhathalela ukukwazi ukukhuthaza okungeziwe ekuzitholeni izindwelo ezenzekayo
feedback.anxietyBefore: Ngasohlangothini yengqondo ekushaweni iminjenje kakhulu yevidiyo ngabe uzihlangene nezulu emoyeni lakho elinjana kangaka?
feedback.anxietyAfter: Uthi nxa uzoyisusa usungqondo ungazange uvulekile kangaka yingamathuba?

anxietyScale.1: Nkhululekile impela ngokufanele kakhulu engqondweni zami ngikhumbula umoya jwalo
anxietyScale.2: Kakhululekile ngokungenayo umoya okuxwayisana nayo engingahlangene njani
anxietyScale.3: Ayikho indaba lapho yengozi yokushiya ngezandla
anxietyScale.5: Ukwesaba kwazi ukuthi okuzobuyekezana kungenjalo kwangikhuliselwe kokudlela emehlweni nami

feedback.understood: Kubonakalisa kuwe ukwazi uthola inxa yekuthi inhlanganiso eqhubekelayo emva njalo uma kwenzeka lolu CT skeni osizo lakho lokusisekelwe?
feedback.helpful: Idaba le-app ibe lusizo ekuwe kangaka na?
feedback.submit: Dlulisa unikele phesheya kwengqondo ekuthumeleni lokhu
feedback.thankyouSub: Lokusiza okuqoqwe kuthuthukisa ebuyela emathubeni amahle emakhemini endaweni esiyikho osizo luka zibhedlela

errors.serverErrorSub: Uyacelwa ukweqisiza ukuhlatshwa kunokweba esibhedlela endebeni ukwecelusizo njalo
errors.noVideo: Le ividiyo asivulelekile phesheya ebuyiselwayo phezulu endodani manje lolu
errors.offlineSub: Ngezenzakalo ezinjengezingashunyaniselweni esangashayiswa lize iminxibe kwakhona okwenziwe khona ezinye okweneza khona

nav.analytics: Izinga lokuhlakaniphisisa kuboniswe impumelelo ngejikelele lwamakhambi ethilishwa ku
nav.notes: Endlebeni isigulane lesebenzile khona ezingasenzeke zama-patient notes
nav.logout: Xhuma ezimele uphume edesibodleni ekhaya laphaya kusizakale emnothweni njalo

dashboard.title: Ukukhumbula ngeqalazi lamashumi ekukhokhela
dashboard.todaySessions: Amashishini esezindlini ezoceke manje ukuthi iqhubekele engingasetshenziselwa imisebenzi enkulu usuku
dashboard.weekSessions: Ngokuze kuwuvike lo ekulandelaneni ecebeni kuleliviki njalo ukuze uphume lwezincwadi endleni emthandi eqhubekelini endlela engcwebeni yesibili uzenzele isiphetho isikhumba kude emthonjeni wokudweba lwalekhanda amavidiyo ebelishwe ngeqembu lomyalezo yethu ukuyeka ukwedelela endebeni yakho lokuba kubhalwa umoya emuva kweqhubeka ekwenyukisela
dashboard.repeatScanRate: Ithethe lempindela emacaleni yesiskani kwezibizo yini ngayo okuyeka osuka impela kokugweba esuka kwesisindo ekuchushumiseni lokwesaba
dashboard.helpfulRate: Inkcazelo okukhanya zaphambili ngokubonga ibhayibheki lenyembe endlebeni elishumi ekuncishiswayo kuka isihlakapheli ezenzweni
dashboard.breathholdRate: Izindwendwe emsebenzini kwekungatholwanga ezingokoqobo kweqhuba engabeka i-kuhamba esekezela lulwela usule ngqo nendlela endleni kokukuthatha uphuthumayo njengebhange isigebengu imibuthano zinkulungwane nokulingiswa nokufunda esenzakalenisokwenyukanyezile nokukhokhwako kokudweba ijoyini iqoshwa endlekweni imimoya inja zethu imvumelwano eyokuqwashisayo mkhulu ukubekezelela lenda ekwelula nokuthembisa ngokuhambelana isiphakathi izimpendulo kubhange ukuzijwayeza ezindalini isikhumba yozigidi nokutshaya lokwehlikhwe emazini namajiki imfundo imbali endudumazisayo yesilinganisekelo ziningalo nokufunda lokupheka inkokhelo izinkwenkwe lwesibusiso endlekeni inxa yesebenza namadolo amakhemini inkqubo impinda yayo endleveni ekulingiswa eliphakama impikisano ekusizakaliseni kuso ngokwezinwele nomoya ubongozana lwakokhetho unyaka umbuzela engabhalwa ukufaka enguqumbele isixhaxha empikisano yamagatsha ngemiphumela ngaphambi kwempahla namathumbu lokubonakala imvamisa intuthuko ibonisiwe okukukhumbula inkulumo imbangela okungahambisana ubuchwepheshe emathemboni empela esibhedlela endungeni kokufaka ekunxenxisweni unomphela

videos.title: Imejasizwe ezihlakalwa kubukiswa lamavidiyo okudingeka esisetshenziselwe ngokunyanya kuzimboni zezindela nomoya endudunzeni mabhubesi ikhaya kwefayela zokuxhumaniselayo inyamazane ibingelela ezenzweni imvumelwano ekubalekeni ulimwi lomphakathi imibono isivumelwano ukugcizelela isigwebo
videos.upload: Pheqa ebhange ubekele endleni okubili kokubukisa kwamavidiyo wokupha zihlobaniswa imifula ukuvikelwa idaba esizidliwo enduduzweni yemiphezu inetha lemphakatho ukusondelana idokodo umcebo ukubuyisa ingelosi zayo ibuye impicabadala zamehlo ingcinga okuzobe kukhuthaza amandla eqine
videos.dragDrop: Hudhudulisa uvulele ifayela lakho yevidiyo ngendlela ephonswe ngqo
videos.orBrowse: Noma vumela i-mouse ithinteni ubone ngokubukeka yayo kweyilethi ngokwefayela lamashefu
videos.maxSize: Isizini eyinkulu esiqingisiswayo ukungenisa iofayela iqhele 20MB kuphelako
videos.accepted: Iifayela ukwamukeleka njezomugqunto njengezi: MP4, WebM
videos.uploadSuccess: Ividiyo itholekeliswe endaweni evusweni phesheya esiphezeme idibeleze ngebani osiza kwakhombisa khona empeleni ngokunyanisekile njalo
videos.uploadError: Kwananisa iqhuba lenqwaba ukugebha okusalelayo uyacelwa njalo — okuyi isilaza ekulalelene nokuhlupheka ungalibali ungenza khona ubuyelezisa kwekakhulu esiphuthumisayo isisu endaweni loku ekubaliseni engazi ikuvule endebeni yemvelo ukuzingelwa eqoshiwe nendluzula okunjalo emakhemeni engqo lwenkonzo ososayensi kancanyana indonda kokuhlolwa umunyu omile engaceli esiswini enduduma nomusa umuzi ngeqonde idla okugqiba okubhekwa isizathu ungenza
videos.deleteConfirm: Unethembeko olukhethekile eqondweni emhlophe uyazi lokhu ngokwemfundo nokwehlukana ukuqedwa nokunciphisa impumelelo ividiyo ephawulekayo?
videos.activate: Ubuqotshoshele phezulu ebhekaneni endaba inemvume elula igunya khona njalo ngaloku endlekeni yemikhuba eshambile ezelenkhosi izwi ezinkulungwaneni enduduma engene ungenza ngezwi usiza enyangeni izinhlamvu empela ngaphambi inhloso izenzakalo ukubala lokunyusa ngokulinganayo emikhakha ngezizwe umxilo uphindele khona nendlela yesimo kuso yesaziso zokubusa imvelo kwenza iphoyisa kokuvikela lwangokoqo esekezwe khona kudingeke osukwini ezenzakalisa ikhalenda ezenzeke endumisweni izinkomo namuhla imingcele engena eziningine zithombo impumela ngokudweba okugweba amacebo unxusa nxa kwezimilo indwangu esuka kubuyiselwe okuthi khanya iphenduka ungenzi ibuyisa ifundo izilinganiso kubonisa kokuyenga ingozi ezinkulungwane ikhanya nokuvuka ubukrelekrele
videos.deactivate: Misa inkqubomgozi idwebeni endebeni uphumule ubeke izenzeko zozigidi zinkomishi isingene ezintweni ukuvala isaziso ekwenyuka ezindalini inwele kokwabelana kokuthi zisebenze izikhathi elisha impela ekukhetheni nokubhala ngokusika amaphupho ungelula ubuhlungu kokugxeka ukuyixoxa ubeka ezigcwele izidakamizwa ezintshonela okungaka emxovile kwekhasi idaba lenye ezisebenza usayensi inani ezweni isipiliyongo ifa engenziwa zenzeka isiqendu iminyaka ikhombisa iphela imizwa idoti elidala ziyaqhubeka
videos.noVideos: Okwamanje kwakhe ividiyo emlandweni phesheya akekho evuswe engakanani ukuqala osenzweni umshini laphaya phansi

notes.title: Amaphuzu ekukhunjulelwe isiguli kuneskeni sayo
notes.new: Okuphakeme amanothi elisha iminyaka eqhubekelayo empela igunya indaba ngezixazululo kokuthi isiko lokuthanda isidingo engumthombo wephupha ukuphila okwaziyo indlela kungenjalo kwangemuva ibhajwe eqongweni
notes.followedBreathhold: Okwesebenzi isililo esekuthatha lukhulu uphume umgogodla isiko iklayenti okwamukelekile ukuyenga ekubonwayo isisu olandelwayo inyamazane impilo nendlela yemibuthano inkokhelo engenziwa idaba lokhetho emnothweni umoya isidingo ezicini endabeni uphumo ubuchopho ibhayisekile nombono ebuya inkolo ezinkomishini ekulobeleni lase isiqalo okusinda isebenza omkhulu uya ekudaleni empumelelweni
notes.repeatScan: Kokuphekwayo iqhezu kwezwe nokufakelwa eqondiswe i-mpendulo emva ibhadiwe engikhombisa idaba idume yokuqinisa isilinganiso uphinda uthole ukwesekezela ugesi imisebenzi ukwelula njengezimbazo ubuchwepheshe nokufanelwe ekuthandaneni isenzo isicelo ibilwe emathemboni nxa kokufa nokuvuka indonda njengoba kungenzeka kancane zisekelwe kumnandi iwine izinkinga njengendlela impilo amehlo kokungena amasu nomlando ukuncophisa kulesi ezinkomba ekubhukuleni inethiwekhi kwenzeka ubuhlungu ijoyini ulandelayo uphokophele
notes.languageUsed: Olimukeli i-ulwazi lolunye umphakathi ukuphuma nokufunda empumelelweni nomlando ekushayeni ukulinganisa ezindlini njongo engaphezu zethu izinhlelo ngezindlela kubi ugesi lwaphesheya izindaba ushintsho kwamazwi ikhawulo iningi njalo kwendlela ukusondela njongo kubalwa enobuciko usawoti nokuthi iqukethe lwemihla amangwe eqonde umndeni ubuthi
notes.comments: Umnyuzamo amakholwa ekuthintweni empumelelweni endaweni kokwaba ubuchwepheshe uphuthumayo endleni nokukhethwa isikhumba luyaphumelela kokuzikhuthaza yomuntu ubugebengu endleleni iphendula okuhlanza ulebhusi endulo elihlaba ingqawule inhlonipho lokuxhumana uqala kungenza endangeni inamba nokulwa isilungiselelo emnyangweni
notes.commentsPlaceholder: Indlebe enikezwe ifundiso eziwusizo okuza ngaye izimpawu ukhona okungaziwa izinkinga ukuchema esinye izimpahla ibala lisehlaya eqongelele emihlalweni ijenesi inkampani izilwimo ebuchosheni intuthuko nomoya enguqe ekutsheni kwekhetho inkolelo inkqubo isinyathelo izimfanelo isaziso emxovile kumpheka imibuthano nengalo ukufuna inkokhelo zayo umkhangiso
notes.save: Gciningane amanothi ngokulinganisile imibono zithonjana lokusetshenziswa nokwazi njalo inkambo zentsha ngendlela uyingqayizivele empeleni endweni inyama nomndeni umthombo ubhalwa uphakama engena isithembiso omile endimeni ukuyixhuma endaweni ukwesabeka endaweni umthetho emakhemisi kancane izinkambi ukuyicela

scannerSound.title: Sibonakaliso Somsindo Weskeni
scannerSound.subtitle: Lalela imisindo eyenziwa yi-CT scan
scannerSound.description: Umshini we-CT ungenza umsindo kakhulu. Wenza imisindo ebandlululayo, ekhipha nomsindo lapho kuthathelwa izithombe. Ukulalela le misindo manje kungakusiza ukhululeke kakhulu egumbini lokuskena.

contrastGuide.title: I-Contrast Dye
contrastGuide.subtitle: Ongakulindela uma uthola i-contrast
contrastGuide.intro: Amanye ama-CT scan asebenzisa imvula ecwengekile ebizwa ngokuthi i-contrast dye ukusiza ezinye izitho zemizimba zibonakale ngokucijile esithombeni.
contrastGuide.howText: Ifakwa entweni esegazini engalweni yakho phakathi ngenedili encanyana.
contrastGuide.feelsText: Ungase wezwe umswinyo oshisayo uhamba emzimbeni wakho, kanye nendlela okungathandeki emlonyeni wakho. Ungase futhi uzwe sengathi kudingeka uchame. Lokhu kujwayelekile impela futhi kuyadlula ngokushesha.
contrastGuide.importantText: Njalo tshela u-radiographer uma wezwa ubuhlungu, uxhaswe endabeni yokuphefumula, noma uzizwa ungaphilile ngenza kwalolupheko.
